user.title: Add Soehnle AC500
user.description: Choose whether you want to select a visible AC500 or enter its Bluetooth MAC address manually.

scan.title: Visible AC500 devices
scan.description: Select one of the AC500 purifiers currently visible via Home Assistant Bluetooth.

manual.title: Enter Bluetooth MAC address
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of the AC500 you want to set up.

confirm_bluetooth.title: Set up {name}
confirm_bluetooth.description: A Soehnle AC500 was discovered at {address}. {details}. Continue to add it to Home Assistant. Pairing is available afterwards via the Pair action, and control commands will automatically open a short control-mode session only when needed.

error.invalid_mac: Enter a valid Bluetooth MAC address in the form AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.
error.no_bluetooth_scanner: Home Assistant currently has no connectable Bluetooth adapter or proxy available.
error.no_devices_found: No visible AC500 devices are currently available.
